label: Telekommunikation
description: Scaffold för telekommunikationsbolag med fokus på produktnytta, teknisk trovärdighet, priser, support och leadgenerering.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende kring säkerhet, driftsäkerhet och support

routes.purpose: Positionera telekombolaget, förklara erbjudandet snabbt och driva registrering eller kontakt.
Presentera tjänster, abonnemang eller kommunikationslösningar för privatpersoner eller företag med tydliga användningsfall.
Visa paket, abonnemang eller prisnivåer så att besökaren kan jämföra alternativ och ta nästa steg.
Bygga förtroende genom att visa team, arbetssätt och företagets inriktning på service, teknik och kundnytta.
Fånga upp registreringar, säljsamtal och supportrelaterade förfrågningar via tydliga kontaktvägar.

routes.when: när erbjudandet kräver svar på vanliga frågor om täckning, drift, säkerhet, avtal eller onboarding
när bolaget publicerar produktnyheter, driftinformation eller branschuppdateringar
när bolaget aktivt samlar prenumeranter för produktnyheter eller driftrelaterad information

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what the company offers and include a primary CTA tied to registration or contact.
Value propositions should come before deeper trust material so the visitor first understands the product benefit.
Solutions summary must describe concrete telecom offers such as connectivity, telephony, messaging or business communication solutions.
Trust proof must reference real signals such as support availability, security practices, uptime commitments or named reference customers when provided.
Final CTA should not repeat the exact same wording used in every previous section.
Solutions intro must connect the company identity to the actual telecom services offered.
Solution list items must be specific and understandable, not vague claims about innovation.
Use cases should show who each solution is for, such as small businesses, teams with mobile staff or customers needing stable connectivity.
If pricing summary is shown here, it should stay high-level and defer detailed comparison to the pricing page.
Pricing intro must explain what the visitor is comparing, for example subscriptions, packages or enterprise plans.
Pricing table must present honest plan differences and avoid implying features or guarantees that are not supplied in content.
CTA after pricing should guide the visitor to register, request contact or choose a plan.
About story must be specific about the company's focus, customers or way of working, not generic brand filler.
Team section should only show real people or roles provided by the dossier.
Trust proof should reinforce reliability and service quality without inventing certifications, customer counts or coverage claims.
Contact page must provide real contact paths relevant to sales or support.
If a form is present, it should make the next step clear, such as registration interest, demo request or general inquiry.
Map should only be shown when a real visitable address exists.

mustPass: Has home route '/' and contact route.
Reflects telecom buying journey with solutions and pricing as core pages.
Supports trust signals around security, support and reliability without making unverifiable claims.
Uses Swedish lowercase paths with leading slash and no trailing slash.
Provides sectionsPerRoute for every default route.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without telecom-specific solution and pricing pages
invented certifications, uptime figures, customer counts or coverage claims
overloading the site with technical jargon before explaining customer benefit
mixing support promises and commercial CTAs in a confusing way

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Telekommunikation, mobiltelefoni, bredband, företagsväxel, kommunikationslösningar, abonnemang, priser, support, säkerhet, drift, onboarding, registrera dig, FAQ, nyheter, kontakt.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold when the company sells telecom, connectivity, telephony or communication services.
Strong fit when pricing, plans, uptime, security, support and product benefit are central to the purchase journey.
Prefer this over a generic SaaS scaffold when the offer is clearly telecom or operator-like rather than broad software only.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
